arabic_text:
چوتھی عقل
دائرہ سکیلی پہلا ارد
دائرہ سکیلی آخری ارد
دعوت
english_text:
Fourth Intellect
First circular orbit (inner)
Last circular orbit (outer)
Da'wat (Invitation)
alt_text: A red ringed circle representing the sphere of the Fourth Intellect (چوتھی عقل), with diagonal Urdu labels marking the first and last circular orbits. A green arrow curves around the circle and exits at the bottom-left labeled 'دعوت' (Da'wat), depicting how the invitation flows outward from this intellect's sphere.
notes: Diagram of the Fourth Intellect's outgoing Da'wat in the chain of seven intellects. Diagonal Urdu labels are decorative orientation markers; exact transliteration of the orbital names may need refinement during Phase 0b.
